bdo.util.net.ssl.compositejks

Class CompositeX509KeyManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • bdo.util.net.ssl.compositejks.CompositeX509KeyManager
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    javax.net.ssl.KeyManager, javax.net.ssl.X509KeyManager

    public class CompositeX509KeyManager
extends java.lang.Object
implements javax.net.ssl.X509KeyManager
    Merges multiple X509KeyManagers into a delegating composite.
